articles.title: What's happening with Iran-US 'talks'?
articles.description: Diplomatic efforts to end the war in Iran are accelerating. Proposals are being exchanged through Pakistan, though Iran denies direct talks with the US. The conflict's outcome remains uncertain.

topStories.description: Iran gave US  boats of oil as gift to show seriousness in talks tankers were Pakflagged says Trump

topStories.title: Venezuela's Nicolas Maduro, wife produced in New York court in drug trafficking case, months after capture by US
topStories.description: Nicolas Maduro, the former President of Venezuela, on Thursday (local time), headed into a New York courtroom as he seeks to have his drug trafficking indictment dismissed, AP reported.

topStories.title: Pak not neutral, Trump will listen to Modi: US war expert pitches India as mediator
topStories.description: Pak not neutral Trump will listen to Modi US war expert pitches India as mediator

topStories.title: Iran-US war impacted ‘fertilisers, steel and aluminum’ the most, says Saudi Arabia Finance Minister
topStories.description: Saudi Arabia’s Finance Minister Al-Jadaan said that while oil has dominated media coverage, it is refined products – including fertilisers, steel and aluminum – that have been most affected due to the ongoing war.

topStories.title: Pakistan says it is mediating US-Iran talks
topStories.description: Pakistan says it is mediating indirect talks between the US and Iran aimed at ending the war.

topStories.title: From DKS to ‘Samrat Ashoka’, Karnataka MLAs dissolve party lines to seek free IPL tickets: ‘We are VIPs’
topStories.description: BJP leader raises issue in House; Congress MLA explains why KSCA must give special treatment to MLAs, demands five tickets each; speaker says four could do.

topStories.title: What's happening with Iran-US 'talks'?
topStories.description: Diplomatic efforts to end the war in Iran are accelerating. Proposals are being exchanged through Pakistan, though Iran denies direct talks with the US. Iran's demands include an end to aggression and financial compensation. The US seeks Iran's nuclear disarmament and missile program limits. Both sides need to claim victory for a deal. The conflict's outcome remains uncertain.

topStories.title: 'White Plague': One Of Humanity's Deadliest Killers Resurging In US
topStories.description: Tuberculosis is preventable and curable with antibiotics, but treatment typically lasts 6-9 months.

topStories.title: Trump urges GOP to end filibuster amid DHS shutdown, TSA staffing crisis, targets Chuck Schumer
topStories.description: In a strongly worded message on social media, Trump pressed lawmakers to eliminate the Senate filibuster rule, which requires 60 votes to advance legislation.

dailyNews.title: Quote of the Day by Naval Ravikant: ‘Play long-term games with long-term people’
dailyNews.description: Modern philosopher and entrepreneur Naval Ravikant's insights challenge us to rethink how we approach wealth, happiness, and personal growth.

dailyNews.title: Trump reveals Iran's ‘gift’, says Tehran let 10 oil tankers pass through Strait of Hormuz
dailyNews.description: Speaking during a Cabinet meeting at the White House, Trump said Tehran permitted 10 oil tankers to transit the critical shipping lane.

dailyNews.title: Jimmy Kimmel’s ‘plumber’ remark on US security chief triggers outrage: ‘Not a great look’
dailyNews.description: US late-night host Jimmy Kimmel is facing criticism online after mocking the country’s new Homeland Security chief as a “plumber” during his show, with many calling the remark elitist and dismissive of working-class professions.

dailyNews.title: Trump to hold cabinet meeting today amid DHS shutdown pressure and Iran war
dailyNews.description: The Cabinet forum is scheduled to begin at 10 a.m. EDT, with Trump expected to discuss both domestic operational challenges and foreign policy priorities amid the continuing DHS funding deadlock.

dailyNews.title: US tightens social media vetting — how your posts, likes may impact H-1B, K-3, G-5 visa applications
dailyNews.description: The US expanded its social media screening and vetting process to include more visa categories including G-5, H-3, H-4 dependents of H-3, K-1, K-2, K-3, Q, R-1, R-2, S, T, and U.

dailyNews.title: Russian officials meet US counterparts as Moscow denies aiding Iran
dailyNews.description: Kremlin spokesperson says talks are part of '​necessary dialogue' with Washington as war in Ukraine continues.

dailyNews.title: TSA wait times spike at major US airports as DHS funding stalemate continues
dailyNews.description: Acting TSA Administrator Ha Nguyen McNeill told Congress on Wednesday (March 25) that some airport wait times have exceeded 4.5 hours.

dailyNews.title: European Parliament gives conditional approval to EU-US trade deal
dailyNews.description: The agreement would see EU tariffs on US goods reduced to zero while US tariffs on EU imports set at 15%.

dailyNews.title: Sydney Sweeney thanks military service members as she reveals brother is deployed
dailyNews.description: Sydney Sweeney shared a photo of her deployed brother Trent, a U.S. Air Force staff sergeant, and thanked all service members stationed overseas.

dailyNews.title: Watchdog warns legal powerhouse has made far-left advocacy their 'dominant focus' over the last decade
dailyNews.description: Trump-aligned watchdog group, America First Legal, says a decade of American Bar Association amicus briefs shows the powerful legal group pushed liberal outcomes 80% of the time it weighed in.

dailyNews.title: Brother, sister indicted in alleged IED plot at Florida base tied to Iran war; one suspect in China
dailyNews.description: FBI Tampa has obtained indictments of a brother and sister in connection with a possible explosive device found at MacDill Air Force Base. The brother is in China.

dailyNews.title: Lindsey Vonn keeping return to skiing on table despite injuries: 'I don't like to close the door on anything'
dailyNews.description: Lindsey Vonn said she's not ready to call it a career after five surgeries and a near-amputation following her Milan Cortina Olympics crash.

dailyNews.title: Musk attorney demands probe into jury bias after panel allegedly ‘mocked’ process
dailyNews.description: The filing says jurors used damages figure to "send a message" in the trial, and details broader claims that Musk, in their view, was denied a fair trial.

dailyNews.title: Blue Jays stars caught sitting in wrong seats at Maple Leafs game in hilarious moment
dailyNews.description: Toronto Blue Jays stars George Springer and Ernie Clement were asked to move seats by an usher during the Maple Leafs' 4-3 win over the New York Rangers on Wednesday in a viral moment.

topStories.description: Zelenskyy claimed U.S. security guarantees for Ukraine are tied to ceding Donbas to Russia, but the White House says those claims are false.

topStories.title: Trump lashes out at 'sick' Iranian leaders, confirms estimated timeline for ending war
topStories.description: NATO failed a test by not joining the U.S. military operation against Iran, President Donald Trump said during a Thursday Cabinet meeting.

topStories.title: Harvard student says Jewish classmates feel 'unwelcome' as multibillion dollar DOJ lawsuit looms
topStories.description: A Harvard sophomore says Jewish students feel unwelcome as the Trump DOJ files a multibillion-dollar lawsuit over the school's handling of antisemitism.

topStories.title: After Wooing Trump With Deals, Pakistan Gets a Seat at the Table
topStories.description: Steve Witkoff, a diplomatic envoy, used the Board of Peace to announce an agreement that could raze a Pakistan-owned Manhattan hotel. Now the country is involved in negotiating peace talks with Iran.

topStories.title: Some Judges See Risks in Fiery Opinions Warning of Threats to Democracy
topStories.description: Federal judges are weighing strategies for how to respond to the high stakes, anonymous threats and politicized atmosphere of the Trump era.

dailyNews.title: Trump Calls for Law Cracking Down on Crime and ‘Rogue Judges’
dailyNews.description: Ahead of the midterms, President Trump told a Republican gathering that he wants to go after repeat offenders and “rogue judges that are criminals.”

dailyNews.title: Wealthy Investors Target Foes of Clean Energy, Seeking Revenge
dailyNews.description: Renewable energy leaders said their industry got “rolled” in President Trump’s tax bill. Now they’re fighting back, starting in Texas.

dailyNews.title: Trump reveals Iran apparently gifted the U.S. boats of oil that moved through Strait of Hormuz
dailyNews.description: President Trump said Iran gifted the U.S. multiple boats of oil that were moved through the Strait of Hormuz. Mr. Trump made the comments during a Cabinet meeting after saying the gifts were proof that the regime was looking to negotiate an end to the war.

dailyNews.title: Witkoff says U.S. presented Iran with 15-point plan for potential peace proposal
dailyNews.description: President Trump warned Iran to make a deal on his terms "before it is too late."

dailyNews.title: Steve Witkoff says U.S. presented 15-point plan to end Iran war
dailyNews.description: President Trump's adviser Steve Witkoff spoke at a Cabinet meeting on Thursday and confirmed that the U.S. presented Iran with a 15-point action plan for peace through Pakistani mediators.

dailyNews.title: Trump holds first Cabinet meeting since Iran war sparked
dailyNews.description: President Trump is commenting on the Iran war at the first Cabinet meeting since the conflict in the Middle East began. CBS News' Olivia Rinaldi reports.

dailyNews.title: H. R. McMaster breaks down Trump's rhetoric on Iran war
dailyNews.description: CBS News contributor H. R. McMaster, President Trump's national security adviser during his first presidential term, joins with more details on what may come next for President Trump and the military operations in the Middle East.

dailyNews.title: Trump says Iran is "begging to make a deal, not me"
dailyNews.description: President Trump held his first Cabinet meeting since the war in Iran began, and he continues to claim that Tehran wants to negotiate with the U.S. Mr. Trump also slammed NATO for its reluctance to join efforts against the regime.

dailyNews.title: Attacks Escalate in Middle East as Trump Insists Iran Wants a Deal
dailyNews.description: Iran and Israel exchanged a new wave of strikes on Wednesday as President Donald Trump insisted Iran is desperate for a deal, saying, “They want to make a deal so badly, but they’re afraid to say it.” It comes as gas prices are continuing to rise worldwide with Iran blocking oil through the Strait of Hormuz. NBC’s Richard Engel reports for TODAY.

dailyNews.title: DOJ says it erroneously relied on ICE memo to justify immigration courthouse arrests
dailyNews.description: The Trump administration admitted in a court filing that it had erroneously relied on an ICE memo to justify arrests at immigration courthouses as part of an ongoing federal case brought by groups seeking to block the tactic.

dailyNews.title: Trump says oil and stock market reaction to Iran conflict not as severe as he expected
dailyNews.description: Trump expressed confidence in the war effort and said the economic damage will reverse.

dailyNews.title: Trump to Congress: End DHS shutdown or face 'very drastic measures'
dailyNews.description: Lawmakers are stalled on funding the Department of Homeland Security as airport delays mount.
